inter.name: Inter
inter.description: Designed for computer screens with a tall x-height and letterforms optimized for readability at small sizes.
inter.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

geist.name: Geist
geist.description: A new font family created by Vercel, inspired by the Swiss International Style.
geist.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

geist-mono.name: Geist Mono
geist-mono.description: A monospace companion to Geist, designed for code and technical contexts.

merriweather.name: Merriweather
merriweather.description: Crafted for optimal screen readability with large x-heights, slightly condensed letterforms, and sturdy serifs.
merriweather.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

lora.name: Lora
lora.description: A well-balanced contemporary serif with moderate contrast. Brushed curves give it a literary quality suited for long-form reading.
lora.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

playfair-display.name: Playfair Display
playfair-display.description: An elegant transitional serif inspired by 18th-century typography. High contrast letterforms for editorial headlines.
playfair-display.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

libre-baskerville.name: Libre Baskerville
libre-baskerville.description: Based on the 1941 American Type Founders Baskerville, optimized for body text with wide spacing.
libre-baskerville.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

cormorant-garamond.name: Cormorant Garamond
cormorant-garamond.description: A free display type family based on the Garamond tradition. Excels in high-end editorial and luxury branding contexts.
cormorant-garamond.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

roboto.name: Roboto
roboto.description: Google's signature typeface. Dual-nature design with mechanical skeleton and geometric forms alongside friendly open curves.
roboto.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

open-sans.name: Open Sans
open-sans.description: A humanist sans serif with open forms and neutral appearance. Optimized for legibility across print, web, and mobile interfaces.
open-sans.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

source-sans-3.name: Source Sans 3
source-sans-3.description: Adobe's first open-source typeface. A clean, versatile sans designed for both UI and long-form reading.
source-sans-3.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

work-sans.name: Work Sans
work-sans.description: Based loosely on early Grotesques. Optimized for screen use, particularly at medium sizes for interfaces.
work-sans.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

manrope.name: Manrope
manrope.description: A modern geometric grotesque with subtle optical corrections. Popular in tech and SaaS products.
manrope.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

nunito.name: Nunito
nunito.description: A well-balanced rounded terminal sans-serif with very large x-height. Perfect for friendly, approachable interfaces.
nunito.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

rubik.name: Rubik
rubik.description: A sans serif font with slightly rounded corners, designed as part of the Chrome Cube Lab project.
rubik.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

dm-sans.name: DM Sans
dm-sans.description: A low-contrast geometric sans-serif designed for use at small sizes. Clean, modern, and highly legible.
dm-sans.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

poppins.name: Poppins
poppins.description: A geometric sans-serif with monolinear letterforms. Each letterform is nearly monolinear with optical corrections applied.
poppins.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

bebas-neue.name: Bebas Neue
bebas-neue.description: A sans-serif display font widely used in headlines and call-to-action contexts. Tall, narrow, and commanding.
bebas-neue.preview: THE QUICK BROWN FOX JUMPS OVER THE LAZY DOG

oswald.name: Oswald
oswald.description: A reworking of gothic typeface style historically called Alternate Gothic. Condensed letterforms for impactful headlines.
oswald.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

archivo-black.name: Archivo Black
archivo-black.description: A grotesque sans-serif display typeface optimized for headlines. Maximum visual impact and presence.
archivo-black.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

anton.name: Anton
anton.description: A reworking of traditional advertising sans-serifs. Strong and condensed for headlines that demand attention.
anton.preview: THE QUICK BROWN FOX JUMPS OVER THE LAZY DOG

bungee.name: Bungee
bungee.description: Inspired by urban sign-painting traditions. Bold and impactful with strong vertical rhythm for display use.
bungee.preview: THE QUICK BROWN FOX JUMPS OVER THE LAZY DOG

jetbrains-mono.name: JetBrains Mono
jetbrains-mono.description: Designed specifically for developers with increased height for a better reading experience and distinctive letterforms for code.

fira-code.name: Fira Code
fira-code.description: A monospace font with programming ligatures. Common code sequences render as single glyphs for better readability.

ibm-plex-mono.name: IBM Plex Mono
ibm-plex-mono.description: IBM's corporate monospace typeface. Clear, open, and neutral with a humanist character for technical contexts.

space-mono.name: Space Mono
space-mono.description: A fixed-width type family built for editorial use in headlines and display. Distinct retro-digital aesthetic.

roboto-mono.name: Roboto Mono
roboto-mono.description: A monospace addition to the Roboto type family. Designed for technical contexts and code display.

caveat.name: Caveat
caveat.description: A casual handwriting typeface with an informal, spontaneous feel. Great for annotations and personal touch elements.
caveat.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

pacifico.name: Pacifico
pacifico.description: An original brushscript inspired by 1950s American surf culture. Casual, friendly, and full of character.
pacifico.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

kalam.name: Kalam
kalam.description: An informal handwriting typeface conveys a genuine handmade quality with warmth and personality.
kalam.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

dancing-script.name: Dancing Script
dancing-script.description: A lively casual script with bouncing letters and varying connecting strokes. Evokes natural, spontaneous handwriting.
dancing-script.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

satisfy.name: Satisfy
satisfy.description: A script typeface with swashes and calligraphic details. Elegant and fluid for logos and decorative contexts.
satisfy.preview: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
